title: qPALACE Project Introduction

description: An introductory overview of the qPALACE project, its goals, current status, and ongoing research directions.

title: Hierarchical Qubit Mapping
speaker: Daniel Wu
description: Presentation slides accompanying the Nature Quantum Information paper on hierarchical qubit mapping for near-term quantum devices.

title: Compiler-Driven Optimization for Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computing

description: Slides for the IEEE Quantum Week 2025 talk on compiler-driven optimization strategies for fault-tolerant quantum computing.

title: Quantum Circuit Mapping: A Survey

description: Workshop presentation covering a survey of quantum circuit mapping algorithms and their trade-offs.

title: Lattice Surgery and T-Count Reduction

description: Internal reading group discussion on reducing T-count using lattice surgery techniques. (Internal material — title and notes only.)

title: Benchmarking Quantum Compilers

description: Lab talk presenting the methodology and results of our quantum compiler benchmark suite.
